subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at Kinney home in New York, 1912-12-02
subcodes.first_line: These are the days of my farewell to you, for I am sailing on the fifth of the month… let each one of you be as a lamp shining forth with the light of the virtues
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @exhortations and counsels, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @being a source of light; guidance
